runners.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 8 over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight behind Adhana Layla beaten 2.25 lengths (17.45) in a Grade 6. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.21) at this track in a Grade 6, finishing fifth and beaten 4 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and four minors. Tough line-up and may struggle.

runners.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Gawler to win by 1.5 lengths in 23.09, beating Cool It Miss. Last start finished 5th on April 7 over 342m at this track behind Budgeree beaten 2.5 lengths (20.04) in a Other. Well placed and among the chances here.
